_meta.purpose: Week 0 deliverable — held-out sample of historical-style requests, and the labelled test set for the Week 2 classifier accuracy measurement.
_meta.provenance: SYNTHETIC. No real client data was available at POC time; these are realistic Nigerian FM/property requests (including pidgin and terse phrasing) hand-written and hand-labelled by the build team. They contain no real personal data.

samples.text: There is a burst pipe flooding the lobby on the ground floor, water is everywhere please come now
No light for the whole of Block C since morning, the generator is not coming on
The lift in Tower 2 has stopped working and someone is trapped inside
AC in my flat has stopped cooling, it's very hot. Unit 4B
The security gate motor is faulty, we are opening it by hand since yesterday
Please the bulb in my kitchen has blown, whenever you are chanced
Toilet seat in unit 12 is loose, no rush
Abeg the cleaners never come clean my corridor for two weeks now
I want to know my service charge balance for this year
Why is my service charge invoice higher than last year? Please explain the breakdown
I paid my service charge last week but it is still showing as unpaid on my statement
Please send me a receipt for the payment I made for Q1
I am disputing the arrears on my account, I already cleared it in January
This is Sparkle Cleaning. We have completed the deep clean for Block A, invoice attached ref INV-2026-0088
SecureGuard here — night shift completed, submitting our monthly invoice for payment
CoolAir HVAC: the servicing job for Ikoyi Heights is done, please process our payment
The security men are always sleeping on duty, this is unacceptable
I am very unhappy with how the facility manager spoke to me yesterday, very rude
The noise from the construction next door is disturbing every night, nobody is doing anything
Good morning
Please what are the office hours for the estate management office?
How do I register my new tenant on the portal?
there is a strange burning smell coming from the electrical room on the 2nd floor
kindly confirm you received my email about the leaking roof in unit 9, still waiting
